mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the unemployment rate below 5.0% signals a tightening labor market, which increases corporate earnings visibility and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and payroll employment indicates robust supply-side capacity utilization, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential construction permits and consumer spending (RSAFS) during a demand expansion phase signal increased economic activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal of HOUST and RSAFS fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.03) during confirmed demand expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading below 2.0% indicates disinflationary pressures, which reduces central bank policy rate expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL is below 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth rate above 3.0% indicates strong supply-side capacity expansion, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where GDPC1 exceeds 3.0% growth.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of strong GDP growth and low policy rates indicates an expansionary macro environment, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of GDPC1 and FEDFUNDS fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) during expansionary policy periods.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in payroll employment above 100k signals strong labor market dynamics, which boosts consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k growth.
